prior_modes.same_season_train_only: Use clean clips from the same batter-season in the training split only.
prior_modes.past_only: Use only clean clips earlier than the current event game_date.
prior_modes.oracle_full_season: Analysis-only mode using the full season except the current event.

leakage_policy.oracle_full_season: allowed for analysis only and must set uses_future_clips when applicable
leakage_policy.same_event_views: must be handled by same_event_ensemble, not player-season prior
